posts.author: Akash_Shah
posts.text: Genus Power Infrastructures vs Genus Innovation — Many related company share common address. That doesn’t mean one is under another or is a subsidiary. Check annual report of company, it should clearly identify if it is related company or subsidiary.

posts.author: Singrauli
posts.text: Genus Power Infrastructures vs Genus Innovation — Genus Power Infrastructures Limited and Genus Innovation Limited are separate sister companies under the broader Kailash/Genus Group management. Genus Innovation is not a division/subsidiary of Genus Power Infra.

posts.text: Genus Power Infrastructures vs Genus Innovation — Are Genus Power Infrastructures Limited and Genus Innovation under Genus Power Infrastructures Limited ? Genus Innovation (Solar) is just a sister company under management of Kailash Group ?
